evals.name: route-ambiguous-entry
evals.expected_output: Detects the source is a single arXiv paper and routes to paper-learn (invokes it with the link), rather than treating it as a repo, topic, or book. If anything were ambiguous it would ask one quick question first.

evals.name: build-library-hub
evals.prompt: 把我做过的这些学习页汇总成一个能离线打开的学习库首页。
evals.expected_output: Finds the library root, runs build-hub.py over it, and produces a self-contained learn-hub/index.html that indexes every *-learn page grouped by type (github-project / domain / textbook / paper / other), with type filters, search, thumbnails from each page's assets, relative links, and a per-page learn-status toggle persisted in the hub's localStorage. Opens it and explains how to refresh. Does not invent pages that aren't on disk.

evals.name: disambiguate-pdf
evals.prompt: 我这有个 PDF 想学，帮我做成学习页。（一个 PDF 文件）
evals.expected_output: Asks one quick question to tell whether the PDF is a single paper (→ paper-learn) or a full textbook (→ textbook-learn) — using length/structure as the hint — then routes accordingly instead of guessing.
